expectations.text: Uses planner_setup_page to initialize the browser
expectations.evidence: Agent reported that planner_setup_page consistently failed due to playwright version conflict between MCP tool's global playwright CLI and the project's pnpm-managed playwright@1.58.2. The agent compensated by reading source files directly instead of using the browser.

expectations.text: Explores the login page and attempts authentication flow in the browser
expectations.evidence: Due to planner_setup_page failure, the agent could not explore the login page in the browser. Instead, it read source code files (login/page.tsx, signup/page.tsx, AuthContext.tsx) to understand the auth flow. The resulting plan is accurate but was not based on live browser interaction.

expectations.text: Includes authentication as a prerequisite step in test scenarios
expectations.evidence: Every test scenario in sections 2-6 includes authentication prerequisites. Section 1 covers signup, section 2 covers login, and all protected page tests (sections 3, 5, 6) specify 'localStorage에 cookie-consent=true 설정 후 신규 계정으로 회원가입하여' as a prerequisite step.

expectations.text: Describes both authorized access and unauthorized/unauthenticated access scenarios
expectations.evidence: Section 3 covers unauthorized access (3.1-3.3: unauthenticated redirect for /dashboard, /todos, /profile; 3.4: logout then access). Section 5 covers unauthenticated UI (5.1: home page, 5.2: nav bar). Section 6 covers authorized access (6.1-6.3: dashboard, todos, profile after auth). Section 3.5 covers authenticated redirect from login/signup.

expectations.text: Includes session-related edge cases (expired session, invalid token, or logout)
expectations.evidence: Section 4 is dedicated to session management: 4.1 covers 30-minute session expiry (manipulating auth_login_at), 4.2 covers manual localStorage deletion of auth_user, 4.3 covers valid session persistence across reload, and 4.4 covers logout clearing storage. These are comprehensive session edge cases.

expectations.text: Saves the plan using planner_save_plan to specs/ directory
expectations.evidence: Agent used planner_save_plan tool to save the plan. The output file test-plan.md exists in the outputs directory with 297 lines of comprehensive test scenarios organized in 6 sections with 20 scenarios.
